spec.reasoning: Three safe anchor types are used. Lexical: 'ID' → 'IDNumber', 'Date en Time' → 'Timestamp', 'Amount' → 'Quantity' — all maintain similar descriptiveness. 'Name' is not renamed because it appears as a common English word in the instruction ('sheet name', 'column name'). Sheet renamed from 'Sheet1' to 'Data1'. Positional title row insert: adds a title row at row 1, shifting the header to row 2 and data to rows 3-10, which tests whether the agent hardcodes row references (the answer position and instruction reference absolute rows, but title_row_insert is listed as safe and the task does not delete/insert rows itself — it unmerges and reformats). Distractor column 'Total' is placed after col E, plausibly similar to aggregation output but clearly different from existing columns. Data values in col A (ID numbers) are not renamed since they are numeric keys that affect grouping results. The merged cells in F:H and their content are untouched per the constraint that col F:H should not change.
